title: Clean Code & Scalability
description: Writing readable, well-commented, and decoupled code. Architecting applications so they remain maintainable under increasing traffic and data loads.

title: Developer Experience (DX)
description: Building tools, plugins, and helper libraries that improve onboarding, testing, and deployment speeds for other engineers.

title: Performance First
description: Minimizing bundle sizes, optimizing database indexes, offloading heavy processing to asynchronous tasks, and aiming for sub-second load times.

title: Open Source Advocacy
description: Contributing back to public projects like WordPress core, maintaining extensions, and supporting community development workflows.
